summary: User reproduced npx opennori setup failing after confirmation because setup's internal global npm install did not inherit the command-local npm min-release-age exemption. OpenNori now runs npm install -g opennori@<version> --min-release-age=0 for its own CLI install, detects stale Codex Plugin versions instead of treating any enabled plugin as ready, and prints a readable setup_failed recovery message instead of throwing on missing data.

sources.label: npm exec -- vitest run test/cli-commands.test.js -t 'setup command|interactive setup'
sources.command: npm exec -- vitest run test/cli-commands.test.js -t 'setup command|interactive setup'

reviewability: Review the changed setup plan generation and interactive setup error rendering; rerun npm dry-run commands to see min-release-age behavior; rerun npm run check for full coverage.
limitations: This records source-level and local verification. Published npm users need a new OpenNori release before npx opennori setup includes the fix.
